evidence_quotes.quote: Distributers should not be allowed to completely revoke access to purchased products for their own gain or simply because maintaining them is deemed inconvenient.

paragraphs.text: As many others, I agree with the DFAs goals. I would like to draw the EU's attention to the "Stop Killing Games"-Movement and its related European Citizens' Initiative which has gained over 1.400.000 Signatures. Distributers should not be allowed to completely revoke access to purchased products for their own gain or simply because maintaining them is deemed inconvenient. Additionally, please consider addressing the monopolistic control of payment processors over digital transactions, as highlighted by the recent VISA/Mastercard censorship of platforms like Steam and Itch.io.
